process: forge-atom clean pipeline (codex img2img on a chroma plate -> despill -> low-fi -> trim glyph -> pad to the ADR-0026 64x64 canvas -> dimension assert), method-verified via the codex rollout (image_generation_call), NOT code-drawn

castle.note: Flat chess-rook PIECE for the Party squad picker / lobby rows. Named 'castle' (not 'rook') because provenance + the forge name-filter key by bare name and the shields/rook heraldic emblem already owns 'rook'. CSS .icon-rook -> kit/icons/castle.png.

gear.method: carved main-menu gear (codex img2img, rollout-verified) adopted as the shared settings gear
gear.gate: soft-alpha (menu hero register — NOT the forge-atom hard-alpha gate)
gear.note: Replaced the forge-atom gear so the whole game shares ONE settings gear. Source: icons-carved/settings-smooth.png packed via pack-menu-icons.mjs. Same bytes ship to kit/icons/gear.png (Settings rail + Skirmish HUD) and the menu row (icons-carved/settings.png); the account cog is the same art at 37x37.

sign-in.note: Entry-door counterpart to sign-out, scaled to the same 50x59-ish painted footprint so the title-bar account button stays locked at the avatar size.

studio-catalog.method: image-generator (verified) — scripts/forge-studio-switcher-icons.mjs; indie pixel-art of a period object (open illuminated codex). NOT anti-story-anchored (owner's call): a plain recognizable object.

studio-lab.method: image-generator (verified) — scripts/forge-studio-switcher-icons.mjs; indie pixel-art of a period object (corked alchemist's flask). NOT anti-story-anchored (owner's call).

studio-viewer.method: image-generator (verified) — scripts/forge-studio-switcher-icons.mjs; indie pixel-art of a period object (brass-rimmed hand lens). NOT anti-story-anchored (owner's call).

codex-outer-panel.method: Codex chrome family sheet -> extractor -> atom-built 9-slice

codex-outer-divider.method: Codex chrome family sheet -> atomless natural T + authored rail bar

codex-outer-tee.method: Codex chrome family sheet -> atomless natural T crop

codex-outer-cross.method: Codex chrome family sheet -> atomless natural cross crop

codex-parts-outer-panel.method: Independent generated corner atom + rail source -> extractor -> atom-built 9-slice

codex-parts-inner-panel.method: Independent generated small corner atom + small rail source -> extractor -> atom-built 9-slice

codex-parts-inner-divider.method: Independent generated small rail + atomless cross-derived T -> authored rail bar

codex-parts-inner-tee.method: Independent small atomless cross source -> derived left-side T crop

codex-parts-inner-cross.method: Independent generated small atomless cross source

note: Settings icon set re-forged onto the ADR-0026 64x64 canvas. The 15 content glyphs were regenerated through forge-atom's clean pipeline and method-verified (a real image_generation_call in the rollout, not a PIL/SVG hand-draw). lyre/bell were re-canvased from their already-approved forge-atom output (pixels preserved, centered on 64). brand-shield is the 256x256 source-sprite exception (ADR-0026) and was intentionally not re-forged.
